error[E0277]: `RefCell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/grok-code-fast-1/external_definitions/external_objs_1/sample_005/target.rs:4:12
  |
4 | static I1: LazyLock<RefCell<i32>> = LazyLock::new(|| RefCell::new(1));
  |            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `RefCell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
  |
  = help: the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `RefCell<i32>`
  = note: if you want to do aliasing and mutation between multiple threads, use `std::sync::RwLock` instead
  = note: required for `LazyLock<RefCell<i32>>` to implement `Sync`
  = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`
